docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED; JURY TRIAL SET; NOTICE MAILED FILED BY DEFENDANT LANG, JOHN JURY TRIAL SET FOR MAR-18-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANG, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 41 REED STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,719.60 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,719.60, STAYED UNTIL APR-20-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, EXEC OF EVICTION STAYED THRU 11PM ON 4-19-97. NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. PLTF WILL PAY TO DEFT THE SUM OF $300 SHOULD DEFT VACATE TIMELY & LEAVE PREM IN BROOM-CLEAN COND. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREM DEEMED ABANDONED. SEE JUDGMNT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
